name: Rattlebone & Associates
specialty: Specializing in covert infiltrations and information retrieval, Rattlebone & Associates have a reputation for unearthing secrets that others cannot reach.

members.name: Vesper Rattlebone
members.note: The eldest of the trio, his body bears the scars of a lifetime spent in the Undercity's shadows.

members.name: Sylas Shadowtread
members.note: With his keen senses and agility, Sylas is the group's silent watcher, always one step ahead.

members.name: Brona Ironclaw
members.note: Brona's battle-hardened frame and imposing presence make her an intimidating force in the Undercity.

visual: The trio can often be found dressed in dark, practical attire, their faces obscured by hoods and masks. They move with a calculated grace, always aware of their surroundings.
reputation_note: Whispers in the Undercity claim that Rattlebone & Associates are no ordinary adventurers – they are Serpent Choir operatives, working in the shadows for their own mysterious ends.
history: [2026-03-11] Completed a investigation-tier contract. Rank: Unknown (+1/5)
